input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8602 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The observed javac failure is an API-compatibility issue, not missing setup: org.eclipse.sisu.inject changes from 0.0.0.M3 to 0.0.0.M4, and QualifiedTypeBinder.hear now takes (Class, Object) instead of (Annotation, Class, Object).

Optional dependencies such as slf4j-api, OSGi APIs, JUnit, and TestNG appear in the POM/manifest, but normal meaningful coverage of bean binding, class-space scanning, SisuGuice lookup/injection, URLClassSpace, and bean-property reflection does not require adding them up front.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No concrete extra setup is needed: sisu-inject-bean is an in-process legacy Sisu/Guice wrapper, and its required runtime pieces are already resolved transitively by the library artifact.
